overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a first-person exploration of a luxury futuristic apartment. The player walks through a red-carpeted living room featuring a prominent holographic aquarium display, modern white sofas, and minimalist lighting, approaching a doorway where a figure appears.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury apartment living room with holographic display

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the living room toward the holographic aquarium display on the far wall

entered.detail: large glowing holographic sphere with orange and blue fish swimming around it mounted on the dark wall
long white sectional sofa with clean lines along the right wall
low rectangular dark coffee table with magazines or items on top
ceiling with parallel wooden slats arranged in a wave-like pattern
tall rectangular illuminated floor lamp with warm white light
tall rectangular illuminated floor lamp near the sofa
deep red plush wall-to-wall carpet covering the entire floor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a luxurious futuristic apartment living room with distinctive red carpeting and modern minimalist furniture. A prominent holographic aquarium display featuring glowing fish orbiting a blue sphere dominates the far wall, while warm floor lamps illuminate the space. The camera moves steadily forward through the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: apartment interior transitioning toward back rooms

events.description: holographic aquarium display moves out of view as camera passes the living room area

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward through the apartment past the living room furniture toward the back of the space

entered.detail: large abstract wall art with horizontal red and white stripes on the far right wall
dark doorway leading to an adjacent room at the end of the apartment

segments.scene_description: Having passed the living room area, the camera moves through the deeper interior of the apartment. The holographic display is now behind, and the focus shifts toward a doorway at the far end. An abstract painting with red and white stripes becomes visible on the right wall as the left floor lamp recedes into the distance.

events.description: figure becomes visible standing in the doorway ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching the doorway at the end of the room where a figure is standing in the threshold

notable_agents.action: standing in the doorway facing toward the camera as the player approaches

entered.detail: dark metallic door frame marking the threshold to the next room
small green illuminated light or sign near the door frame

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the doorway at the end of the apartment, where a figure becomes visible standing in the threshold. The living room elements have receded, and the focus is now on the door frame with a green light indicator. The figure remains stationary as the camera moves closer to enter the adjacent space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a luxury futuristic apartment that transitions from a wide living area toward a mysterious figure in a doorway. It begins by gliding across distinctive red carpeting and past modern minimalist furniture, with a glowing holographic aquarium featuring fish orbiting a blue sphere dominating the initial view. As the camera moves deeper into the interior, the holographic display recedes and the focus shifts toward an abstract red and white striped painting on the right wall. The scene then narrows as the living room elements fade into the background, drawing the viewer closer to a doorway marked by a green light indicator. Finally, the camera approaches the threshold where a stationary figure stands, poised at the entrance to the adjacent space.
